caption: A group of people, including adults and children, stand outdoors in front of a rustic wooden structure and dense green foliage. A man in a light-colored, short-sleeved button-down shirt stands prominently with his arms crossed over his chest, looking forward with a serious expression. Beside him, several other individuals are gathered, including a woman in a dark hooded garment and several children. One child wears a bright orange garment and has their arms crossed, mirroring the man's posture, while another child wears a white top with blue patterns and a third wears a pink hooded garment. The scene remains static across the sequence, with the people maintaining their positions and expressions. There are no visible objects, equipment, on-screen text, or logos present in the scene.
